backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining Article and UserProfile types, state maps, and CRUD operations for articles and user profiles with role-based access control enforced via AccessControl and MixinAuthorization mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the homepage hero section was replaced with a generic featured-article hero (any content type) in HomePage.tsx, mapped to test requirement REQ-10.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for the project's frontend structure and responsibilities.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the UI.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Vite/React app, setting the page title to 'Inside Pet Tech' and mounting the React root via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with public (Navbar/Footer) and admin layout route trees, wraps the app in ThemeProvider, and renders the Toaster.
frontend/src/components/articles/Article: Reusable article card component supporting default, compact, and featured display variants, each linking to the article detail page with thumbnail, category badge, title, author, and date.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Modal dialog that collects a new user's name and bio on first login and saves the profile via the saveCallerUserProfile mutation, blocking dismissal until submission.
frontend/src/components/layout/Footer.ts: Renders the site footer with a brand logo, topic category links, an about blurb, copyright notice, and a caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/layout/Navbar.ts: Renders the sticky top navigation bar with a logo, category links, sign-in/sign-out controls via Internet Identity, an admin link, and a mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook that manage DFINITY AuthClient lifecycle, persisting and exposing the user's identity along with login/logout status.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend data operations including fetching published, featured, and category-filtered articles, admin queries, user profile retrieval, and CRUD mutations for articles.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, configures Tailwind, defines CSS custom properties for the editorial color palette (light and dark modes), and adds utility classes for brand gradients and editorial shadows.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility functions and constants for the frontend, including class merging, date formatting, and label/slug/gradient mappings for categories, content types, and article statuses.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
Admin dashboard page that lists all articles in a table with actions to edit, publish, archive, and delete each article, using status badges and confirmation dialogs.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminLayout.tsx: Admin layout component that handles authentication via Internet Identity, checks admin privileges, and renders a sidebar navigation with links to dashboard sections. Shows appropriate login, loading, or access-denied states based on auth/admin status.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ArticleEditor.t: Form component for creating or editing articles in the admin panel, supporting all article fields (title, slug, category, status, etc.) with auto-slug generation on create and integration with create/update mutation hooks.
frontend/src/pages/ArticleDetailPage.tsx: Page component that displays a single article by slug, showing metadata, thumbnail, content, and up to 3 related articles from the same category, with a loading skeleton state.
frontend/src/pages/CategoryPage.tsx: Page component that displays all published articles for a given category slug, with a styled header, article grid, loading skeletons, and an empty state.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Home page component featuring a featured hero article, article grid with skeletons, and sections pulling from published and featured article queries.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with helpers for persisting values to sessionStorage and cleaning sensitive params from the URL.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom brand colors (crimson/indigo), editorial typography using Playfair Display and Inter fonts, custom shadows, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file describing 'Inside Pet Tech', a pet industry news site modeled after Retail Dive, including its existing features (homepage, category pages, article detail, admin dashboard) and architectural notes.
